mapper.select: SELECT m.message_id, m.conversation_id, m.conversation_seq, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.client_msg_id, m.message_type, m.content_json, m.summary, m.message_status, m.sent_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM bluenote_im.im_conversation_message cm JOIN bluenote_im.im_message m ON m.message_id = cm.message_id WHERE cm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cm.conversation_seq > #{afterSeq} AND cm.conversation_seq > #{lastVisibleSeq} ORDER BY cm.conversation_seq ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.message_id, m.conversation_id, m.conversation_seq, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.client_msg_id, m.message_type, m.content_json, m.summary, m.message_status, m.sent_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM bluenote_im.im_conversation_message cm JOIN bluenote_im.im_message m ON m.message_id = cm.message_id WHERE cm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cm.conversation_seq < #{beforeSeq} AND cm.conversation_seq > #{lastVisibleSeq} ORDER BY cm.conversation_seq DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) t ORDER BY conversation_seq ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.message_id, m.conversation_id, m.conversation_seq, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.client_msg_id, m.message_type, m.content_json, m.summary, m.message_status, m.sent_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM bluenote_im.im_conversation_message cm JOIN bluenote_im.im_message m ON m.message_id = cm.message_id WHERE cm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cm.conversation_seq > #{lastVisibleSeq} ORDER BY cm.conversation_seq DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) t ORDER BY conversation_seq ASC
